title: Interference-Aware Multi-Task Unlearning
summary:
arXiv:2605.19042v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Machine unlearning aims to remove the contribution of designated training data from a trained model while preserving performance on the remaining data. Existing work mainly focuses on single-task settings, whereas modern models often operate in multi-task setups with shared backbones, where removing supervision for one task or instance can unintentionally affect others.
